metadata.description: A resource quota scoped to a namespace — hard limits on aggregate resource consumption (CPU, memory, pods, storage, object counts) within a single namespace. Models the Kubernetes ResourceQuota construct. Placement and enrichment policies query quotas to determine whether a namespace has capacity for a new workload before dispatching. Discovered-state reporting surfaces actual usage against the hard limits for capacity planning and drift detection.

adopts.role: namespace-scoped aggregate resource limits and usage tracking

lifecycle.decommission: Provider removes the quota. Resources in the namespace are no longer constrained by this quota (other quotas may still apply).

namespace_ref.description: Resource reference to a Platform.Namespace (common-elements §2.5, ADR-025). Authored by handle; deferred resolution supported (claim-before-define).

oneOf.description: Short form — the handle of an existing Platform.Namespace.

hard.description: Hard resource limits. Any key is a Kubernetes resource name.

used.description: Current resource usage against the hard limits (discovered state). Same keys as hard limits.
